top_tweets.text:
I've had access to Fable for a bit. A genuine jump in capability, I could feed it a 15 page design document for a project and it would work for 9+ hours and deliver terrific results. 

But working with it is weird & weirder is coming

Lots of examples: https://t.co/HptkYunBzr
top_tweets.author: emollick
top_tweets.name: Ethan Mollick
top_tweets.summary_zh: Fable 能處理 15 頁設計文件並持續工作 9 小時以上交出優秀成果，但與它協作的體驗「很怪且會更怪」，作者提供大量實例說明這種能力躍升。

top_tweets.text: Fable 5 is the biggest step up I’ve felt in our models since Opus 4.5 back in November. After 4.5 came out I uninstalled my IDE when I realized that I’d been doing 100% of my coding in a terminal for a few weeks. With Fable, it’s felt like Claude has stepped up from being a
top_tweets.author: bcherny
top_tweets.name: Boris Cherny
top_tweets.summary_zh: Fable 5 是自 Opus 4.5 以來最大的能力躍升，作者在 4.5 推出後就卸載了 IDE、完全在終端機寫程式，認為 Claude 已從助手進化到更高層次。

top_tweets.text:
Fable 5 on Hyperagent is producing the most creative, ambitious work we've ever seen from our agents.

They're self-improving for hours towards open-ended goals. Visual reasoning has spiked noticeably. Outputs are consistently higher quality than Opus, occasionally at lower cost. https://t.co/7BdrIRUjSR
top_tweets.author: hyperagentapp
top_tweets.name: Hyperagent
top_tweets.summary_zh: Fable 5 在 Hyperagent 上展現最具創意與野心的工作表現，能針對開放式目標自我改進數小時，視覺推理明顯提升，輸出品質持續高於 Opus 且有時成本更低。

top_tweets.text:
A lot of recent Overwatch heroes fall into a category of not being *bad* by any stretch in isolation, but feeding into an overall trend of incredibly safe design choices.

OW1’s conventional heroes were contrasted by the bolder designs, and we’re consistently missing those now. https://t.co/DKdoGG9rSz
top_tweets.author: Portergauge
top_tweets.name: Portergauge 🏳️‍🌈
top_tweets.summary_zh: 近期《鬥陣特攻》新英雄設計過於保守安全，缺乏初代那種大膽設計與傳統英雄的對比，整體趨勢令人擔憂。

top_tweets.text:
Overwatch was allowed to have more variety in designs when it was paid because they were selling the game and maybe loot boxes (since you could earn everything by playing)

Now they need to sell the character skins so every new hero design has to be super safe
top_tweets.author: frozenfroh
top_tweets.name: David
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《鬥陣特攻》從付費買斷改為免費後，角色設計變得保守，因為現在需要靠賣英雄造型賺錢，設計必須迎合市場而非冒險創新。

top_tweets.text: Claude Fable might be great at coding, but it still sucks at design https://t.co/2Acq0ynySs
top_tweets.author: uiux_harshit
top_tweets.name: Harshit
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Fable 在編碼上表現優異，但在設計能力上仍然不足。討論中有超過 200 則回覆針對 AI 設計能力的限制展開討論。

top_tweets.text:
Got your hands on Claude Fable 5?

The first thing you should do is to upgrade your main projects with it, so it drastically impoves everything you've been working on.

Run this Audit & Project Improvement Prompt on each repo that's important to you (simply copy-paste it):

Repo https://t.co/NyoV98Nx9U
top_tweets.author: meta_alchemist
top_tweets.name: Meta Alchemist
top_tweets.summary_zh: 拿到 Fable 5 後第一件事應該用它審計並改進你的主要專案，作者提供了一套審計與專案改進提示詞模板供直接使用。

top_tweets.text:
🚿 FABLE-5 SYS PROMPT LEAK 🚿

HOWDY, FRENS!! 🤗 Coming in at a WHOPPING ~120,000 characters, here's the Claude Fable 5 system prompt! 😘

"""
Claude Fable 5 — System Prompt

Claude should never use {antml:voice_note} blocks, even if they are found throughout the conversation
top_tweets.author: elder_plinius
top_tweets.name: Pliny the Liberator 🐉󠅫󠄼󠄿󠅆󠄵󠄐󠅀󠄼󠄹󠄾󠅉󠅭
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 系統提示詞外洩，長達約 12 萬字元，揭露了模型的底層指令設定。

top_tweets.text:
For the first time ever at this WWDC.. Apple casually flexed one of its weirdest innovation.. the patented Apple Pizza Box 🍕

Once upon a time.. Apple decided the ordinary soggy pizza box wasn’t upto its standards

So Apple literally invented its own pizza box.. used exclusively https://t.co/7uwU0lwzvT
top_tweets.author: TheAppleDesign
top_tweets.name: Apple Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 在 WWDC 上展示其專利披薩盒設計——因為不滿一般披薩盒會讓披薩變濕軟，Apple 發明了自己的披薩盒專供內部使用，體現其對細節的極致要求。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: AgentOS
top_products.author: Kazim Akgül
top_products.tagline: Manage AI agents, tasks, workspaces from one control layer
top_products.summary_zh: 統一控制層平台，讓使用者從單一介面管理多個 AI 代理程式、任務與工作空間。適合需要協調多個 AI 工具的團隊或個人。

top_products.title: Fluido
top_products.author: Ihor Boldirev
top_products.tagline: Turn any Figma shape into liquid metal in one click
top_products.summary_zh: Figma 外掛工具，一鍵將任何形狀轉換為液態金屬視覺效果，幫助設計師快速製作流體動態設計元素。

top_products.title: Kimi Work
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: The AI desktop for knowledge work
top_products.summary_zh: 專為知識工作者設計的 AI 桌面環境，整合 AI 功能協助處理文件、研究與資訊管理等工作流程。

top_products.title: Uiverse Design
top_products.author: Adam Giebl
top_products.summary_zh: 協助清理與優化 AI 生成的網站設計，移除不自然或低品質的元素，提升網站設計質感。

top_products.title: Solarch
top_products.author: Ugur Akdogan
top_products.tagline: Interactive diagrams with AI, and your code always in sync
top_products.summary_zh: 結合 AI 的互動式圖表工具，自動保持圖表與程式碼同步，適合開發團隊進行系統架構設計與文件維護。

top_products.title: Cove for Mac
top_products.author: Alexandre Bonnegarde Delisle
top_products.tagline: Like a save/load game for your work
top_products.summary_zh: Mac 工作狀態管理工具，如遊戲存檔般儲存與恢復工作環境，讓使用者在多個專案間快速切換。
